system_description: PMMA-based flashing system composed of RamFlash PMMA Primer, PMMA Membrane resin, Fleece reinforcement, and Catalyst. Used as a flashing and detail system often paired with RamTough 250 or Black Pearl field membranes.

assembly_validation.notes: Component list derived from product knowledge. Only 1 DXF file exists in the ranking census (a curb detail), making layer validation extremely limited. Layer names are speculative; the single DXF file may not represent all PMMA conditions. PMMA is primarily a flashing/detail system paired with RT-250 or Black Pearl field membranes.

readiness_blockers: Only 1 DXF file in census — insufficient coverage for condition validation
DXF source files are local-only (gitignored) — layer mapping not validated against parsed JSON
Layer names are speculative — need confirmation from actual DXF layer inventory
DXF JSON parse status unknown for PMMA family
Single DXF has high noise score (18.4205) — poor golden seed candidate

cross_family_relationships.description: PMMA is the standard flashing/detail system paired with RT-250 field membrane
PMMA can also be used as flashing/detail system with Black Pearl field membrane
